<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> I currently have 5 X and 25 Y. Player RED is offering 10 X for my 5 Y. This is a favorable trade since I gain more X, which is a resource I have less of. However, since this is the last round, I need to consider if accepting this trade aligns with my goal of acquiring as many resources as possible. Accepting this trade would give me 15 X (5 original + 10 from RED) and 20 Y (25 original - 5 to RED). This increases my total resources from 30 to 35, which is beneficial. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept your offer. This trade benefits both of us. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
